Package com.dtwthalion.ttio

Class MSImage

java.lang.Object
com.dtwthalion.ttio.MSImage
public class MSImage extends Object
Imaging mass spectrometry dataset with spatial grid and tile access.

Stored as a 3-D intensity cube (height × width × spectralPoints) under /study/image_cube/.

v0.7 M44: I/O routed through StorageGroup / StorageDataset; this class no longer references the low-level Hdf5Group / Hdf5Dataset types.

Composition vs inheritance. In Objective-C, TTIOMSImage inherits from TTIOSpectralDataset so dataset-level fields come for free. In Java, SpectralDataset is a file-handle wrapper whose lifecycle does not map cleanly to an MSImage subclass; composition is used here (the five dataset-level fields live on MSImage directly). This stylistic difference is recorded in docs/api-review-v0.6.md.

API status: Stable.

Cross-language equivalents: Objective-C TTIOMSImage, Python ttio.ms_image.MSImage.

Since:
0.6

    • writeTo

      public void writeTo(StorageGroup studyGroup)
      Write this image cube to a storage study group.

      v0.7 M44: emits the cube as a 3-D dataset via StorageGroup.createDatasetND(java.lang.String, com.dtwthalion.ttio.Enums.Precision, long[], long[], com.dtwthalion.ttio.Enums.Compression, int) so every backend can round-trip the spatial+spectral rank.

    • readFrom

      public static MSImage readFrom(StorageGroup studyGroup)
      Read an image cube from a storage file.

      v0.7 M44: parameter type relaxed to StorageGroup.
